items.name: stepper
items.title: Stepper
items.description: A lightweight, composable stepper primitive for shadcn/ui-style multi-step flows.

items.name: stepper-demo
items.title: Stepper Demo
items.description: A styled Stepper demo with a default export and the Stepper source primitive.

items.name: stepper-intent-onboarding
items.title: Stepper Intent Onboarding
items.description: An intent-driven onboarding block with hidden Stepper state, intent routing, profile validation, interests, async setup, and a signed-in completion state.
